114 return _driver._cuCtxDestroy_v2(ctx) 2/1:1;1=1?1@1[1]1^1_1`1{1|1}1~1a2b2c2d2e2f2g2h2i2j2k2l2m2n2o2p2q2r2s2t2u2v2

116  

117cdef CUresult cuCtxPushCurrent(CUcontext ctx) except ?CUDA_ERROR_NOT_FOUND nogil: 

118 return _driver._cuCtxPushCurrent_v2(ctx) 2;CBR
